table_introductions.table_introduction: This table captures retail sales and field performance records for the BH division, combining order-level details with employee, client, distributor, product, and territory information. It includes measures such as quantity, gross value, net sales value, productive calls, outlet coverage, month-to-date metrics, targets, and achievement percentages. Analysts can use it to track sales performance, outlet productivity, product/category contribution, field employee effectiveness, target achievement, and new outlet growth across regions and time periods.
